title: HYCC Mini Magnetic Stirrer with Magnetic Stirring bar and Magnetic Stir Bar Retriever, 2000 RPM, max. Capacity: 2000ml
description:
【Powerful】 Running strong 100-2000rpm adjustable stirring speed. The magnetic stirrer comes with a magnetic stirring bar and a stirring bar recycler.
【Capacity】 Up to 2000ml which is great for home brew yeast starters and other liquid mixing.
【PORTABILITY】 Easy to carry anywhere, anytime.Small size, only 160 grams in weight.The magnetic stirrer comes with an adapter and a USB cable.
【Widely Use】 For industrial, agricultural, medical and health, scientific research institutions, homebrew and universities laboratory ,etc.
【QUALITY GUARANTEE】 We provide product warranty. If the product is defective, a free replacement is guaranteed. If you have any questions, please contact us, we are always at your service.
reviews_5s:
I have been less than impressed by ready-mix shellac. Too thick, so I had to cut it with alcohol...but how much? And even if I got the consistency right, the chemical additives they put in there to give it longer shelf-life make it slower to dry, and leave a less-than-perfect finish. Also, I was limited to just the colors they produced.

I decided to start making my own "small-batch" shellac, just 4 oz or 8 oz at a time. I bought shellac flakes of different colors, and alcohol, and was happy with my ability to tailor the exact "cut" (thickness) and color, and the finishes I was getting were better than from store-bought shellac. The only fly in the ointment was the amount of time it took to dissolve the flakes completely. A full day, sometimes two.

Enter this little gizmo. I measure into a Mason jar the desired amount of high-test alcohol - either ethanol (i.e., 190-proof Everclear - EXPENSIVE) or isopropyl (99% rubbing acohol - CHEAP), add the correct amount and color(s) of shellac flakes, drop in the magnetic "pill" stirrer, put the jar on this unit, and slowly bring the speed up to where I want it. Then I leave it alone for 90 minuts. Presto, perfect shellac.

If I want to speed it up even more, I use a cheap little coffee grinder to grind the flakes to powder. The shellac is crystal clear in about 20 minutes.

This tiny machine doesn't make BETTER shellac, it just makes it FASTER.Es un ingenioso sistema para mezclar pequeñas porcionesI absolutely LOVE this!! I use this to mix up my own room sprays, body sprays and car diffusers!! This makes life much easier and I'm sure they are mixed alot better than I could do by shaking or hand stirring!!Magnetic stirrer works great specially when mixing Different chemicals. My only complaint is the short power cableIt’s pretty cheap and works perfectI'm just learning how to make love cultures for micology research. This spin plate does what I needed to make liquid cultures. It isn't overly complicated and it comes with everything you need to use it.
